---
# Book title/subtitle come from _quarto-{en,fr}.yml (profile).
---

```{r, include=FALSE}
source("R/chapter_setup.R")
source("R/book_index_helpers.R")
profile <- Sys.getenv("QUARTO_PROFILE", unset = "en")
if (!profile %in% c("en", "fr")) profile <- "en"
init_lecture_chapter(profile)
```

# Home {.unnumbered}

::: {.content-visible when-profile="en"}

Course notes from the Abidjan 2026 Learning Days lecture decks. Use the **left sidebar** to move between lectures.

```{r}
#| results: asis
render_book_chapter_list("en")
```

:::

::: {.content-visible when-profile="fr"}

Supports de cours des Learning Days Abidjan 2026. Utilisez la **barre latérale à gauche** pour naviguer entre les cours.

```{r}
#| results: asis
render_book_chapter_list("fr")
```

:::
